name: mdf commerce inc.
description: mdf commerce inc. is a Montreal-based technology company that enables the flow of commerce by providing a broad set of software-as-a-service (SaaS) solutions. The company specializes in optimizing and accelerating commercial interactions between buyers and sellers through its platforms, which include procurement and publishing solutions for government and private clients, as well as online marketplaces in various verticals such as automotive, IT, and consumer goods. Formerly known as Mediagrif Interactive Technologies Inc., the company continues to evolve its digital ecosystem to streamline complex business processes and enhance efficiency for its diverse global customer base.
